shortDescription: "The rank of an array is not part of its type"
shortCorrection: "The rank of an array is part of its type"

text:
  - id: ofj6
    sections: ["7"]
---
One can assign an array with an arbitrary number of dimensions
to a multi-dimensional array (e.g., `int[][][] a = new int[1][1];` is ok).

frontmatter.shortDescription: The rank of an array is not part of its type
frontmatter.shortCorrection: The rank of an array is part of its type
